title: Fix grammar in Container Tools Guide
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Thanks to @fatherlinux 's eagle eye at spotting them, I've squashed some grammar issues in the Container Tool Guide.
